mapper.sql: su.id id, su.task_id task_id, su.user_id user_id, su.progress progress, su.content content, su.submit_time submit_time
mapper.insert: insert into app_task_progress ( task_id, user_id, progress, content, submit_time ) values ( #{task_id}, #{user_id}, #{progress}, #{content}, #{submit_time} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
,su.user_id as user_id_id1 ,COALESCE(app_user.nickname,app_user.username,sys_user.NAME,sys_user.USERNAME,CONCAT('用户#',CAST(su.user_id AS CHAR))) as user_id_USERNAME1 ,sys_user.PASSWORD as user_id_PASSWORD1 ,sys_user.NAME as user_id_NAME1 ,sys_user.role_manage_id as user_id_role_manage_id1 ,sys_user.create_time as user_id_create_time1 ,sys_user.update_time as user_id_update_time1 ,sys_user.signature as user_id_signature1 ,task_id.task_name as task_id_task_name1 ,task_id.assigner_id as task_id_assigner_id1 ,task_id.assignee_id as task_id_assignee_id1 ,CASE CAST(IFNULL(su.progress,'') AS CHAR) WHEN '0' THEN '未开始' WHEN '1' THEN '进行中' WHEN '2' THEN '已完成' ELSE su.progress END as progress_name1 FROM app_task_progress su
left join sys_user sys_user on CAST(sys_user.id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.user_id AS CHAR) left join app_user app_user on CAST(app_user.id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.user_id AS CHAR) left join app_schedule_task task_id on CAST(task_id.id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.task_id AS CHAR) where 1 = 1 and su.id = #{id} and su.task_id = #{task_id} and su.user_id = #{user_id} and su.progress = #{progress} and su.content = #{content} and su.submit_time = #{submit_time}
and ( CAST(su.user_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{login_user_id} AS CHAR) or CAST(task_id.assignee_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{login_user_id} AS CHAR) or CAST(task_id.assigner_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{login_user_id} AS CHAR) )

SELECT
,su.user_id as user_id_id1 ,COALESCE(app_user.nickname,app_user.username,sys_user.NAME,sys_user.USERNAME,CONCAT('用户#',CAST(su.user_id AS CHAR))) as user_id_USERNAME1 ,sys_user.PASSWORD as user_id_PASSWORD1 ,sys_user.NAME as user_id_NAME1 ,sys_user.role_manage_id as user_id_role_manage_id1 ,sys_user.create_time as user_id_create_time1 ,sys_user.update_time as user_id_update_time1 ,sys_user.signature as user_id_signature1 ,task_id.task_name as task_id_task_name1 ,task_id.assigner_id as task_id_assigner_id1 ,task_id.assignee_id as task_id_assignee_id1 ,CASE CAST(IFNULL(su.progress,'') AS CHAR) WHEN '0' THEN '未开始' WHEN '1' THEN '进行中' WHEN '2' THEN '已完成' ELSE su.progress END as progress_name1 FROM app_task_progress su
left join sys_user sys_user on CAST(sys_user.id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.user_id AS CHAR) left join app_user app_user on CAST(app_user.id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.user_id AS CHAR) left join app_schedule_task task_id on CAST(task_id.id AS CHAR)=CAST(su.task_id AS CHAR) where 1 = 1 and su.id = #{pd.id} and su.task_id = #{pd.task_id} and su.user_id = #{pd.user_id} and su.progress = #{pd.progress} and su.content = #{pd.content} and su.submit_time = #{pd.submit_time}
and ( CAST(su.user_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{pd.login_user_id} AS CHAR) or CAST(task_id.assignee_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{pd.login_user_id} AS CHAR) or CAST(task_id.assigner_id AS CHAR)=CAST(#{pd.login_user_id} AS CHAR) )
